changes.whatWasLeaking: Leaflet web CSS was injected from the root layout for every web route.
changes.whySafe: Leaflet CSS is only required when the web map renderer mounts. Moving injection next to MapRenderer.web keeps route semantics unchanged while reducing web-only pollution.

changes.whatWasLeaking: xlsx was imported eagerly from director screens even though export is optional and web-only.
changes.whySafe: The public export behavior stays the same; only module loading timing changed from eager to on-demand.

notes: MapRenderer platform split was already safe and preserved: MapRenderer.web keeps leaflet, MapRenderer.native keeps react-native-maps.
No broad web/native import rewrite was performed.
